creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
The ?dummy trick seems to work for GitHub, so you can employ it. It'd require you to use groups for PATCH_SITES, though.

PATCH_SITES=	https://github.com/ars3niy/tdlib-purple/pull/129.diff?dummy=/:first_patch \
                ...
PATCHFILES=	129.diff:-p1:first_patch \
                ...
